mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sync_task(hospital_fid, hospital_name, month, task_id, zip_pwd, status, total_count, success_count, fail_count, error_msg, retry_times) VALUES(#{hospitalFid}, #{hospitalName}, #{month}, #{taskId}, #{zipPwd}, #{status}, #{totalCount}, #{successCount}, #{failCount}, #{errorMsg}, #{retryTimes})
mapper.update: UPDATE sync_task SET task_id = COALESCE(#{taskId}, task_id), zip_pwd = COALESCE(#{zipPwd}, zip_pwd), status = #{status}, total_count = #{totalCount}, success_count = #{successCount}, fail_count = #{failCount}, error_msg = #{errorMsg}, retry_times = #{retryTimes}, update_time = datetime('now', '+8 hours') WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sync_task WHERE status = 'FAILED' ORDER BY id
mapper.update: UPDATE sync_task SET task_id = #{taskId}, zip_pwd = #{zipPwd}, update_time = datetime('now', '+8 hours') WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sync_task SET status = #{status}, error_msg = #{errorMsg}, update_time = datetime('now', '+8 hours') WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sync_task WHERE (total_count IS NULL OR total_count = 0) ORDER BY id
SELECT * FROM sync_task WHERE total_count IS NULL OR total_count = 0 ORDER BY id
